index.description: L2 index of methodologies in the claude-code domain. The retriever reads this after picking claude-code from L1 domains.xml. Entries list slug + tier + summary; open the leaf meta.json / content/*.xml for full payload.

methodology.summary: Spec + config for Claude Code subagents: isolated context, whitelisted tools, designated role, decision rule when to use Agent vs Skill vs Command.
Spec for /invoke commands under 250 lines: clear argument syntax, tool whitelist, !-prefix bash for live context, no overhead of skills or agents.
Spec for lifecycle-event hooks: PreToolUse, PostToolUse, SessionStart, Stop. Block dangerous tools, auto-approve safe ops, format on edit, inject session context.
Spec for custom MCP servers in TypeScript or Python: typed tools, schema generation, secure credentials, transport choice, eval gate.
5-minute MCP basics primer + minimal stdio server scaffold (TypeScript / Python) producing a single typed tool.
Curated, audited catalog of public MCP servers organized by category (marketing, analytics, dev, design, PM), with install commands + auth + tool-count + risk score.
Two-file CLAUDE.md + AGENTS.md pattern per directory: CLAUDE.md is @AGENTS.md reference; AGENTS.md is the 20-80 line essential context for both Claude Code and Agent SDK.
Spec for SKILL.md (frontmatter + body), tool-permission scope, global vs project-specific distinction, name conventions, auto-trigger keyword design.
